result.summary: Mapped 1 HTTP API for Printify at https://api.printify.com with OpenAPI docs at developers.printify.com, authenticated via either a personal access token or OAuth 2.0; found no first-party GraphQL API, MCP server, or CLI.

printify_pat.label: Personal access token
printify_pat.setup: Sign in to your Printify account, open [API settings](https://printify.com/app/account/api), and generate a personal access token. The marketing page at [Printify API](https://printify.com/printify-api/) links to `Receive token` there, and the developer docs say individual accounts authenticate with a Personal Access Token.

printify_oauth_app.label: Printify OAuth application
printify_oauth_app.setup: For multi-merchant/platform integrations, use Printify OAuth 2.0 as described in the [developer docs](https://developers.printify.com/). The docs confirm platform access is authenticated through OAuth 2.0, but the public pages scraped here do not expose a self-service app registration page. Start from the [developer docs](https://developers.printify.com/) and contact Printify via their [developer contact form](https://printify.typeform.com/to/pRtkZaZH) if you need enablement or registration details.

variables.name: shop_id
variables.resolveFrom: Call `GET /v1/shops.json` to list shops and use the returned shop ID in `{shop_id}` path placeholders.
variables.description: Merchant shop identifier used by many shop-scoped endpoints.
